title: Fasting, Microbiome Shifts, and Neuroinflammation
teaser: Can alternate-day fasting rewire our cognitive function via the gut microbiome?

title: DHA Target Engagement & Cognition in Dementia Risk
teaser: Does raising brain DHA levels actually slow down cognitive decline?

title: healthspan
teaser: The period of life spent free from chronic disease, disability, and functional decline.

title: metabolic syndrome
teaser: A cluster of metabolic dysregulations (insulin resistance, high blood pressure, abdominal obesity) that elevate cardiovascular disease risk.

title: cardiorespiratory fitness
teaser: The capacity of the respiratory and circulatory systems to supply oxygen to working muscles during sustained exertion (often measured via VO2 max).

title: GRADE
teaser: Grading of Recommendations, Assessment, Development, and Evaluation; a standardized framework for rating the quality of scientific evidence from High to Very Low.

title: Evidence Grade
teaser: A standardized assessment based on the GRADE framework to rate the quality of research supporting an entry, ranging from High to Very Low.

title: DHA
teaser: Docosahexaenoic acid; a long-chain omega-3 polyunsaturated fatty acid essential for brain structure, synaptic transmission, and **blood-brain barrier** integrity.

title: microglia
teaser: The resident macrophage-like immune cells of the central nervous system, responsible for clearing debris, pruning synapses, and mediating **neuroinflammation**.

title: neuroinflammation
teaser: An inflammatory response within the brain or spinal cord, characterized by the activation of **microglia**, release of pro-inflammatory cytokines, and potential synaptic degradation.

title: APOE4
teaser: Apolipoprotein E4; the strongest genetic risk factor allele for sporadic Alzheimer's disease, linked to impaired lipid transport and **blood-brain barrier** dysfunction.

title: Alternate Day Fasting
teaser: A dietary protocol alternating between 24-hour periods of ad libitum eating and 24-hour periods of complete fasting or severe caloric restriction.

title: FMT
teaser: Fecal Microbiota Transplant; the transfer of a processed **microbiota** ecosystem from a healthy donor into the gastrointestinal tract of a recipient to restore metabolic and immunological homeostasis.

title: cognitive function
teaser: The neurological processes of memory, attention, executive control, and reasoning, mediated by synaptic density and coordinated brain networks.

title: homocysteine
teaser: A sulfur-containing **amino acid** intermediary in folate and methionine **metabolism**, whose accumulation is associated with neurotoxicity, **blood-brain barrier** leakage, and cognitive decline.

title: gut-brain axis
teaser: The bidirectional **biochemical** communication network linking the gastrointestinal tract and its resident **microbiota** with the central nervous system.

title: blood-brain barrier
teaser: A highly selective semipermeable **membrane** border of endothelial cells that prevents solutes in the circulating blood from non-selectively crossing into the extracellular fluid of the central nervous system.

title: microbiota
teaser: The collective community of microorganisms (bacteria, fungi, archaea, and viruses) residing within a specific ecological niche, such as the human gastrointestinal tract. *Note: While 'microbiota' refers to the physical population of microbes and 'microbiome' refers to their collective genomes and habitat, they are functionally used interchangeably in clinical literature.*

title: colorectal cancer
teaser: A malignancy originating in the colon or rectum, increasingly observed as sporadic early-onset cases in adults under 50, linked to dietary shifts and **microbiota** mutations.

title: colibactin
teaser: A genotoxic chemical **metabolite** produced by Escherichia coli strains carrying the *pks* **pathogenicity** island, which induces double-strand **DNA** breaks and mutational signatures in host mucosal cells.

title: gut dysbiosis
teaser: An imbalance or maladaptive alteration in the composition, diversity, or functional activity of the gastrointestinal **microbiota**, leading to mucosal barrier degradation and systemic inflammation.

title: folate
teaser: Vitamin B9; an essential **coenzyme** cofactor in one-carbon **metabolism** synthesized by gut bacteria, critical for **DNA** synthesis, repair, and methylation.

title: Vitamin B12
teaser: Cobalamin; a complex water-soluble vitamin synthesized exclusively by bacteria, acting as a **coenzyme** in **methionine** synthesis and **myelin sheath** maintenance.

title: Porphyromonas gingivalis
teaser: A gram-negative, **anaerobic** oral **pathogen** and keystone species in chronic **periodontitis**, linked to systemic inflammation and postmortem brain **pathology**.

title: gingipains
teaser: Toxic **cysteine** protease **enzymes** secreted by **Porphyromonas gingivalis** that degrade neuronal **proteins**, trigger **microglia** activation, and drive **tau** **phosphorylation**.

title: atuzaginstat
teaser: COR388; an experimental, brain-penetrant small-molecule inhibitor of **Porphyromonas gingivalis** Lys-**gingipains**, developed to block **neurodegeneration** in Alzheimer's.

title: all-cause mortality
teaser: The death rate from any cause in a specified population over a defined period, used as a primary validation metric in longevity and **epidemiological studies**.

title: xenohormesis
teaser: The hypothesis that animals have evolved to respond to stress-induced chemical signals synthesized by plants, using them as early warnings to **upregulate** endogenous defense mechanisms.

title: sulforaphane
teaser: An **organosulfur** compound found in cruciferous vegetables that acts as a potent indirect **antioxidant** by inducing the **Nrf2** cellular defense **pathway**.

title: resveratrol
teaser: A dietary **polyphenol** found in red grape skins that acts as an activator of the **SIRT1** deacetylase, mimicking some **physiological** aspects of caloric restriction.

title: EGCG
teaser: Epigallocatechin gallate; the primary green tea **polyphenol** under investigation for modulating **AMPK** signaling and reducing **oxidative stress**.

title: SIRT1
teaser: Sirtuin 1; an NAD+-dependent **protein** deacetylase that acts as a key metabolic sensor regulating chromatin silencing, DNA repair, and mitochondrial biogenesis.

title: AMPK
teaser: AMP-activated **protein** kinase; a conserved master energy sensor that regulates glucose and lipid **metabolism**, and triggers **autophagy** under low energy status.

title: autophagy
teaser: An evolutionary conserved lysosomal **degradation pathway** that recycles damaged **organelles**, **misfolded proteins**, and **intracellular** pathogens to maintain cellular quality control.

title: Nrf2
teaser: Nuclear factor erythroid 2-related factor 2; a **Nuclear factor** that coordinates the **expression** of **cytoprotective**, **antioxidant**, and phase II **detoxification** **enzymes**.

title: protein
teaser: A large biomolecule composed of one or more **amino acid** chains **folded** into a specific 3D structure that dictates its biological activity.

title: DNA
teaser: Deoxyribonucleic acid; the double-stranded helical molecule containing the genetic instructions governing growth, development, and cellular function.

title: gene expression
teaser: The multi-step process by which information encoded in a **gene** is synthesized into functional **proteins** or **RNA** products.

title: pathway
teaser: A linked series of **biochemical** reactions occurring within a cell, activated by specific triggers to achieve a **physiological** endpoint.

title: enzymes
teaser: Biological catalysts (usually **proteins**) that significantly accelerate the rate of specific **biochemical** reactions without being consumed.

title: metabolite
teaser: Any small-molecule intermediate or end-product **synthesized** during cellular **metabolism**, acting as energy currency or signaling cofactors.

title: physiological
teaser: Relating to the normal, healthy functioning of living organisms and their organs, tissues, or cells.

title: pathology
teaser: The structural and functional deviations from the normal **physiological** state, characterizing diseases or **chronic** degeneration.

title: endogenous
teaser: Originating or **synthesized** internally within an organism, tissue, or cell rather than introduced from an external source.

title: upregulate
teaser: The process by which a cell increases the response, rate, or **expression** of a **gene**, **protein**, or metabolic **pathway** in response to external signals.

title: downregulate
teaser: The process by which a cell decreases the response, rate, or **expression** of a **gene**, **protein**, or metabolic **pathway**.

title: pathogen
teaser: Any microorganism (bacteria, virus, fungus, or parasite) capable of causing disease or **chronic** inflammatory damage in a host organism.

title: pathogenicity
teaser: The qualitative ability of a **pathogen** to infect a host, evade immunological defenses, and cause structural or metabolic damage.

title: anaerobic
teaser: Relating to, requiring, or living in an environment that is entirely free of oxygen.

title: periodontitis
teaser: A **chronic** inflammatory gum disease driven by dysbiotic oral plaque, resulting in **alveolar bone resorption** and systemic bacterial leakage.

title: coenzyme
teaser: A non-**protein** organic cofactor required by specific **enzymes** to carry out **catalytic** activities, often acting as transport shuttles.

title: methionine
teaser: An essential **sulfur**-containing **amino acid** that acts as a fundamental initiator of **protein** translation and a precursor to the universal methyl donor SAM.

title: cysteine
teaser: A **sulfur**-containing semi-essential **amino acid** critical for **protein folding** via disulfide bonds and a key precursor to the **antioxidant** glutathione.

title: polyphenol
teaser: A structurally diverse class of natural plant compounds characterized by multiple **phenol rings**, widely investigated for modulating cellular survival pathways.

title: oxidative stress
teaser: An imbalance between the production of **reactive oxygen species** (ROS) and cellular **antioxidant** defenses, leading to **DNA** damage and **lipid peroxidation**.

title: antioxidant
teaser: A molecule capable of neutralizing **reactive oxygen species** (ROS) and **free radicals**, thereby protecting cellular structures from oxidative degradation.

title: organosulfur
teaser: Organic chemical compounds containing **sulfur** atoms, found in foods like garlic and broccoli, known for inducing cellular defense genes.

title: lysosomal
teaser: Relating to lysosomes; acidic cellular **organelles** containing digestive **enzymes** responsible for degrading and recycling cellular waste.

title: degradation pathway
teaser: A regulated biochemical pipeline (such as **autophagy** or proteasomal clearance) designed to break down damaged **proteins** and **organelles**.

title: organelles
teaser: Specialized, **membrane**-bound cellular structures (e.g. mitochondria, lysosomes) that perform distinct **metabolism** or structural duties.

title: misfolded proteins
teaser: Proteins that have failed to fold into their correct 3D shape, rendering them non-functional and prone to aggregating into toxic clumps that disrupt **cell viability**.

title: intracellular
teaser: Occurring, located, or operating entirely within the boundary of a cell **membrane**.

title: Nuclear factor
teaser: A **DNA**-binding transcription factor **protein** that translocates to the cell **nucleus** to control transcription and coordinate **physiological** adaptations.

title: cytoprotective
teaser: Physiological processes or compounds that shield cells from **noxious** agents, **oxidative stress**, or **apoptotic** triggers.

title: detoxification
teaser: The **physiological** conversion and elimination of toxic **endogenous** **metabolites** or **xenobiotic** compounds from cells and tissues.

title: amino acid
teaser: A small organic compound containing both an amino and a carboxyl group, acting as the fundamental monomeric building block of **proteins**.

title: protein folding
teaser: The physical process by which a polypeptide chain folds into its functional 3D conformation from its linear **amino acid** sequence.

title: RNA
teaser: Ribonucleic acid; a single-stranded nucleic acid molecule synthesized from **DNA** that acts as a template for **protein** translation.

title: biochemical
teaser: Relating to the chemical processes, compounds, and pathways occurring within living organisms.

title: synthesized
teaser: The biological or chemical production of complex compounds (such as **proteins** or **metabolites**) from simpler precursors.

title: metabolism
teaser: The complete set of life-sustaining chemical reactions in cells, including catabolism (energy release) and anabolism (molecular synthesis).

title: gene
teaser: A specific sequence of **DNA** nucleotides containing the genetic instructions required to synthesize a single functional **protein** or **RNA** molecule.

title: oligodendrocytes
teaser: Specialized glial cells of the central nervous system that wrap around **axons** to form the insulating **myelin sheath**.

title: axons
teaser: The long, slender projection of a **neuron** that conducts electrical impulses (action potentials) away from the cell body to target cells.

title: microtubule
teaser: Tubular cytoskeletal structures composed of tubulin dimers, essential for maintaining cell shape, enabling **intracellular** transport, and anchoring **tau**.

title: cytoskeleton
teaser: A dynamic network of **protein** filaments (including **microtubules**) that provides structural support, shapes the cell, and facilitates movement.

title: neurons
teaser: Electrically excitable cells of the nervous system specialized for receiving, processing, and transmitting information via chemical and electrical signals.

title: neurofibrillary
teaser: Relating to neurofibrillary tangles; pathological aggregates of hyperphosphorylated **tau** **protein** found inside **neurons** in Alzheimer's disease.

title: phosphate
teaser: An inorganic chemical group consisting of a phosphorus atom bonded to four oxygen atoms, utilized to store energy and toggle **protein** activity.

title: covalent
teaser: A strong chemical bond formed by the sharing of one or more pairs of electrons between atoms.

title: chronic
teaser: A condition or pathological state that persists over a long period (typically months or years) and is slow to resolve.

title: dysbiotic oral plaque
teaser: A pathological oral biofilm where pathogenic bacteria like **Porphyromonas gingivalis** dominate, triggering periodontal inflammation and tissue destruction.

title: alveolar bone resorption
teaser: The pathological osteoclast-mediated breakdown and loss of the alveolar jawbone surrounding teeth, driven by **chronic** periodontitis.

title: catalytic
teaser: Relating to catalysis; the process of accelerating a chemical reaction rate by lowering the activation energy barrier.

title: sulfur
teaser: A chemical element (S) essential for life, acting as a crucial component of **amino acids** (cysteine and methionine) and cofactor structures.

title: phenol rings
teaser: A chemical structure consisting of a hydroxyl group bonded directly to an aromatic benzene ring, found in antioxidants and plant **polyphenols**.

title: reactive oxygen species
teaser: Highly reactive oxygen-containing chemicals (such as hydrogen peroxide and superoxide) that can damage DNA, lipids, and **proteins**.

title: lipid peroxidation
teaser: The oxidative degradation of lipids in **membranes**, where **free radicals** abstract electrons from lipids, leading to cell membrane damage.

title: free radicals
teaser: Atoms or molecules with an unpaired valence electron, making them highly reactive and capable of inducing oxidative damage.

title: membrane
teaser: A selective lipid bilayer boundary wrapping cells and **organelles**, maintaining homeostasis and regulating resource traffic.

title: cell viability
teaser: A measure of the proportion of live, healthy, and functionally active cells within a given population.

title: nucleus
teaser: The membrane-bound organelle within eukaryotic cells hosting the **DNA** chromosomes and coordinating **gene expression**.

title: noxious
teaser: Physiologically harmful, destructive, or toxic to living cells and tissues.

title: apoptotic
teaser: Relating to apoptosis; the programmed cell death pathway that safely eliminates damaged or obsolete cells without causing inflammation.

title: xenobiotic
teaser: A chemical compound (such as a drug, toxin, or pesticide) that is foreign to a biological system and must be neutralized.

title: epidemiological studies
teaser: Research observing the distribution, patterns, and determinants of health and disease conditions in defined populations.

title: myelin sheath
teaser: An insulating layer of lipids and proteins wrapped around nerve fibers (**axons**) that accelerates action potential propagation.

title: tau
teaser: A microtubule-associated protein synthesized in **neurons** that stabilizes axonal structures, whose hyperphosphorylation drives **neurofibrillary** tangles.

title: phosphorylation
teaser: A reversible **biochemical** modification where a **phosphate** group is **covalently** attached to a **protein**, regulating its activity.

title: neurodegeneration
teaser: The progressive structural and functional loss of **neurons**, culminating in **cognitive function** decline and dementia.
